title: Bite size Spike Spencer and Tiffany Grant at MechaCon
display_title: Bite size Spike Spencer and Tiffany Grant at MechaCon
wikitext:
[]: Bite-size Spike Spencer & Tiffany Grant at MechaCon             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Jan 12, 2015 7:54 pm From Spike Spencer's youtube, panel cut into small parts. Absolute goldmine of stuff here compared to other panels. Tiffany talks about Rebuild Asuka not being NGE Asuka - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HsrfNgkxPa0 "Whats your opinion on adding Mari in?" Tiff's response is just awesome - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KlLylJhRXDE Pirate Asuka - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P7O6jRM695g Talking about THAT scene from Eoe - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t1c5jzRZDGE "Is there a blooper outtake that you wish was included?" - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ao9R1foLnWU Neither of them can remember the names of any of the angels - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_3iV0DXzgo Why do the JSSDF just keep pointlessly firing at the angels? - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g7i5XW9Qud4 Do you prefer Rebuild or the original series and Tiff's personal interpretation of Eva - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YLN52_Q0hiw Theories about Mari - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2T5TsWu7i_A Did you think Asuka was going to win the fight in EOE - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ar1qnh6H9NM What was the most difficult line you had to record? - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IRm6oVG7efQ What's your favourite line from your character - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ykLgAOA0dFE Comparing Madam President from Golden Boy (?) and Asuka - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZmjtWTBWgas If you had to be someone else in eva, who would it be - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gMweUIjQIqA Any interesting life experiences that youve drawn on for the characters? - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QkvxdN5mYc4 Favourite insults from Asuka - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R1kOo1I8dzc If you had to give your role to another voice actor, who would it be - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BwrJWEVVm2E Have you voiced any other projects outside the TV series - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y5RrqB5C3O0 Question about cross-overs - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eujQ7wTpRFc Funny question that I'll leave a surprise - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bOUlHfZdrmo More stuff about Asuka speaking German - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j4X1qPMx2oA Comparisons between Evangelion and Pacific Rim - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r7dUkfW09Sw Favourite scene from Eva besides THAT scene: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ILZXXyEx1aY Another funny question I'll leave as a surprise: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5HnLCPXfFXM Have you watched any abridged series - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=04jYKoimZvc Question about ad-libbing - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=749d9bb3yME Most awkward time you ever been identified as a voice actor: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rpii41FbkLA

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 12, 2015 11:29 pm Thanks so much for posting the Youtube links! I noticed Spike talking about these on Twitter (and retweeted that tweet accordingly). tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Mon Jan 19, 2015 1:30 am Damn, Spike is such a cool guy.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Mon Jan 19, 2015 6:39 am interested in this solely for spencer, again i might not like his Shinji performance but the dude is an awesome guy. going to avoid the tiffany grant sections of this like the plague though.
